1509000002.english: Is anyone hurt, by any chance?

1509000003.korean: 고작 이런 거로 다치는 녀석이 있겠어?
1509000003.english: Who'd get hurt over something this trivial?

1509000006.korean:
응? 배터리 너 왜 그런 엉거주춤한 자세로 서 있어?
엉덩이는 왜 가리고?
1509000006.english: Huh? Battery, why are you standing in such a wobbly pose? And why are you covering your butt?

1509000007.korean: 무, 무슨 소리야! 이런 자세로 서 있을 때도 있어!
1509000007.english: W-what are you talking about! I sometimes stand like this!

1509000008.korean:
웃기시네, 일로 와바.
딱 봐도 너 뭔가 숨기고 있잖아!
1509000008.english: That's funny, come over here. I can tell you're hiding something!

1509000014.korean: 야야야, 대박이야. 너도 일로 와서 한 번 봐봐!
1509000014.english: Yo, yo, yo, this is epic. Come over here and take a look!

1509000015.english: What on earth is going on...

1509000017.english: ...Heh... Hahaha! You fool! *cackle* What are you!

1509000019.english: Don't laugh! It was just a brush past!

1509000020.english: That's what you did~ So now you have a monkey's butt~

1509000021.english: Don't call it a monkey butt!

1509000022.korean: 이제부터는 배터리가 아니라 원숭이라 불러야겠는 걸~
1509000022.english: From now on, I'll call you 'Monkey' instead of 'Battery'~

1509000024.korean: 바르그, 너도 와서 봐봐 되게 웃겨.
1509000024.english: Vargr, come see it too, it's hilarious.

1509000025.english: ...If you didn't get seriously hurt, it's fine.

1509000026.english: ...How should I put it, they're so laid‑back.

1509000029.english: I came to rescue you, Yumi!

1509000030.english: ...I get the feeling you're trying to wrap this up quickly?

1509000031.korean: 그럴 리가 있나. 내가 널 구하려고 여태껏 얼마나 찾아다녔는데.
1509000031.english: No way. I've been searching everywhere just to save you.

1509000032.english: I know. Thanks for coming to rescue me.

1509000033.korean: 그래서, 유미 너는 대체 왜 이런 곳에 있는 거야?
1509000033.english: So, Yumi, why on earth are you here?

1509000035.korean: 제타에게 붙잡힌 오메가를 찾으려고 혼자서 여기까지 왔단 말이야?
1509000035.english: You came all the way here alone looking for the Omega that Zeta captured?

1509000037.korean: 누가 엘븐즈 팬 아니랄까 봐… 정말 독종이네…
1509000037.english: I guess nobody's a fan of the Elvenses… they're really a nasty lot.

1509000038.korean: 아무튼, 셰퍼드 씨와 마지막 인간님이 와주셔서 다행이에요.
1509000038.english: Anyway, I'm glad you, Shepherd, and the Last Human showed up.

1509000039.korean: 제타님이 그런 일을 꾸미고 있었다는 건 좀 충격이지만…
1509000039.english: It's shocking that Zeta was behind this, but…

1509000040.korean: 이야기 중에 미안하지만, 이젠 움직이는 게 좋을 것 같아…
1509000040.english: Sorry to interrupt, but I think we should move now…

1509000041.korean: 여기에 오래 있어서 좋을 건 없으니까…
1509000041.english: Staying here any longer won't do us any good…

1509000042.korean:
그래 일단 자리를 옮기자.
유미 너도 당연히 따라올 거지?
1509000042.english: Right, let's get out of here first. Yumi, you'll come with us, right?

1509000043.korean: 네, 어쩌면 오메가 님이 계신 곳에 가게 될 지도 모르니까요.
1509000043.english: Yes, we might end up where Omega is.

1509000044.korean: 유미라고 했나…? 너한테는 물어볼 게 있어…
1509000044.english: Did you say Yumi? I have something to ask you…

1509000045.korean:
저 그러니까… 엡실론 님?
네, 어떤 걸까요?
1509000045.english: Well… Epsilon? Yes, what is it?

1509000046.korean:
네가 여기까지 들어오는 보안을 뚫은 것 같은데 어떻게 한 거야?
아무런 장비도 없이 뚫기란 간단하지 않았을 텐데…
1509000046.english: It looks like you bypassed the security to get in here. How did you do it? It wouldn't have been easy without any gear…

1509000047.korean: 어떻게라고 말씀하셔도… 그냥 직접 시스템 구조를 파악해서 열었다고밖에는…
1509000047.english: Whatever you call it, I just analyzed the system and opened it myself…

1509000048.korean: 비슷한 보안 시스템을 지금까지 수도 없이 만들어 봤거든요.
1509000048.english: I've built countless similar security systems before.

1509000050.korean: 어때? 내 말이 맞지? 수리수리 마수리 열려라 참깨라니까?
1509000050.english: How about it? Am I right? “Open sesame” and all that.
